config.script:
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#define TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME #tmp_rentowsp
class CRentSPHelper private bDisposed
private sub class_initialize() bDisposed = false
dim strSQL strSQL = "create table TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "(" + vbCrLf +_ "trs_pProdukt integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_pOpak integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_pSprz integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_curIloscOpakSP decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_curIloscOpakMag decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_curWartSP decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_curWartMag decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_curWartTMP decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trs_curCenaSP decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ ")" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL trans_.execsql "create index TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME##1 on TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME## (trs_pSprz)" end sub
public sub manual_done() if not bDisposed then bDisposed = true
dim strSQL strSQL = "drop table TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
end if end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK manual_done() end sub
public function get_okres_param() dim pOkresParam : set pOkresParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date_range("Analizowany okres").bindexpr("psp.p_ddatawyst") set get_okres_param = pOkresParam end function
public function get_okres_param_custom_binding(byval field) dim pOkresParam : set pOkresParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date_range("Analizowany okres").bindexpr(field) set get_okres_param_custom_binding = pOkresParam end function
public sub fill_dok_handl(byref pOkresParam) fill_dok_handl_ex pOkresParam.get_where_part(trans_),"" end sub
public sub fill_dok_handl_ex(strOkresParamWhere, strRejestrIDs) fill_dok_handl_ex_uslugi strOkresParamWhere, strRejestrIDs, "" end sub
public sub fill_dok_handl_ex_uslugi(strOkresParamWhere, strRejestrIDs, strUslugi) dim strTylkoTowar: strTylkoTowar = "and n5produkt.eRodzaj=N5PRODUKT_TOWAR" if strUslugi <> "" then strTylkoTowar = "" end if dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select psp.c_pprodukt,psp.c_popak,psp.p_idobj,sum(psp.c_curIloscopak - isnull(orgpsp.c_curIloscopak,0)),0.0," + vbCrLf +_ "sum(psp.c_curwartnetto - isnull(orgpsp.c_curwartnetto,0)),0.0,0.0,sum(psp.c_curcenanetto - isnull(orgpsp.c_curcenanetto,0))" + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as psp " + vbCrLf +_ " join n5produkt on psp.c_pprodukt = n5produkt.idobj " + vbCrLf +_ " left outer join vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje orgpsp on psp.p_ppopsprzed = orgpsp.p_idobj and psp.coll_lp = orgpsp.coll_lp " + vbCrLf +_ "where psp.p_pRozlVAT <> 0 " + strTylkoTowar + " and " + strOkresParamWhere + vbCrLf if strRejestrIDs <> "" then strSQL = strSQL + " and psp.p_pRejestrDok in (" + strRejestrIDs + ")" end if strSQL = strSQL + " group by psp.c_pprodukt,psp.c_popak,psp.p_idobj" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub fill_dok_handl_ALL(byref pOkresParam) dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select psp.c_pprodukt,psp.c_popak,psp.p_idobj,sum(psp.c_curIloscopak - isnull(orgpsp.c_curIloscopak,0)),0.0," + vbCrLf +_ "sum(psp.c_curwartnetto - isnull(orgpsp.c_curwartnetto,0)),0.0,0.0,sum(psp.c_curcenanetto - isnull(orgpsp.c_curcenanetto,0))" + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as psp " + vbCrLf +_ " join n5produkt on psp.c_pprodukt = n5produkt.idobj " + vbCrLf +_ " left outer join vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje orgpsp on psp.p_ppopsprzed = orgpsp.p_idobj and psp.coll_lp = orgpsp.coll_lp " + vbCrLf +_ "where psp.p_pRozlVAT <> 0 and " + pOkresParam.get_where_part(trans_) + vbCrLf +_ "group by psp.c_pprodukt,psp.c_popak,psp.p_idobj" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
#ifdef _RAND public sub fill_dok_mag_related() dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl,0.0,-sum(n5gmop.gmo_curIlosc)," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,sum(n5gmop.gmo_curIlosc * vlp.c_curcenanetto5),0.0,0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from n5gmop join vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje as pdm" + vbCrLf +_ " on pdm.c_pprodukt = n5gmop.gmo_pprod and pdm.c_popak=n5gmop.gmo_popak " +_ " and pdm.p_nnumoper = n5gmop.gmo_nnumop and pdm.coll_lp = n5gmop.gmo_nlp" +_ " join vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania vlp on n5gmop.gmo_pprod=vlp.p_idobj and n5gmop.gmo_popak=vlp.c_idobj"+_ " where pdm.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ and pdm.p_ntypdok in(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ) and pdm.p_wrefdokhandl in (select trs_pSprz from TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME)" + vbCrLf +_ " and n5gmop.gmo_pMag in (select idobj from n5magazyn where eTyp <> N5TYPMAG_ZWROTY)" + vbCrLf +_ " group by pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub #else public sub fill_dok_mag_related() dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl,0.0,-sum(n5gmop.gmo_curIlosc)," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,sum(n5gmop.gmo_curWartosc),0.0,0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from n5gmop join vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje as pdm" + vbCrLf +_ " on pdm.c_pprodukt = n5gmop.gmo_pprod and pdm.c_popak=n5gmop.gmo_popak " +_ " and pdm.p_nnumoper = n5gmop.gmo_nnumop and pdm.coll_lp = n5gmop.gmo_nlp" +_ " where pdm.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ and pdm.p_ntypdok in(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ) and pdm.p_wrefdokhandl in (select trs_pSprz from TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME)" + vbCrLf +_ #ifndef _IOW " and n5gmop.gmo_pMag in (select idobj from n5magazyn where eTyp <> N5TYPMAG_ZWROTY)" + vbCrLf +_ #endif " group by pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub #endif
public sub fill_dok_mag_related_wz() dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl,0.0,-sum(n5gmop.gmo_curIlosc)," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,sum(n5gmop.gmo_curWartosc),0.0,0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from n5gmop join vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje as pdm" + vbCrLf +_ " on pdm.c_pprodukt = n5gmop.gmo_pprod and pdm.c_popak=n5gmop.gmo_popak " +_ " and pdm.p_nnumoper = n5gmop.gmo_nnumop and pdm.coll_lp = n5gmop.gmo_nlp" +_ " where pdm.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ and pdm.p_ntypdok in(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ) and pdm.p_wrefdokhandl in (select trs_pSprz from TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME)" + vbCrLf +_ " and n5gmop.gmo_pMag in (select idobj from n5magazyn where eTyp <> N5TYPMAG_ZWROTY)" + vbCrLf +_ " group by pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub public sub fill_dok_mag_related_qty_only() dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl,0.0,sum(pdm.c_curIloscOpak)," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,0.0,0.0,0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje as pdm" + vbCrLf +_ " where pdm.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ and pdm.p_ntypdok in(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) and pdm.p_wrefdokhandl in (select trs_pSprz from TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME)" + vbCrLf +_ " group by pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub fill_dok_mag_unrelated(byref pOkresParam) dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl,0.0,-sum(n5gmop.gmo_curIlosc)," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,sum(n5gmop.gmo_curWartosc),0.0,0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from n5gmop join vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje as pdm" + vbCrLf +_ " on pdm.c_pprodukt = n5gmop.gmo_pprod and pdm.c_popak=n5gmop.gmo_popak " +_ " and pdm.p_nnumoper = n5gmop.gmo_nnumop and pdm.coll_lp = n5gmop.gmo_nlp" +_ " where pdm.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=0 and pdm.p_wrefdokhandl=0 and pdm.p_ntypdok in(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) and " + pOkresParam.get_where_part(trans_) + vbCrLf +_ " group by pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub fill_dok_mag_unrelated_qty_only(byref pOkresParam) dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl,0.0,sum(pdm.c_curIloscOpak)," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,0.0,0.0,0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje as pdm" + vbCrLf +_ " where pdm.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=0 and pdm.p_wrefdokhandl=0 and pdm.p_ntypdok in(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) and " + pOkresParam.get_where_part(trans_) + vbCrLf +_ " group by pdm.c_pprodukt,pdm.c_popak,pdm.p_wrefdokhandl" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub fill_cena_ost_zak_related_to_dok_handl() dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ " select trs_pprodukt,trs_popak,trs_psprz,0.0,sum(trs_curIloscOpakSP),0.0," + vbCrLf +_ " - sum(trs_curIloscOpakSP) * isnull((select max(vzak.c_curwartnetto/vzak.c_curiloscopak),0.0,0.0 " + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5zakup_listPozycje vzak " + vbCrLf +_ " where vzak.c_pprodukt = trs_pprodukt and vzak.c_popak = trs_popak and " + vbCrLf +_ " vzak.p_ddatazakupu = (select vlz_ddatazakupu from view_lastzakup vlz " + vbCrLf +_ " where vlz.vlz_pProd =vzak.c_pprodukt and vlz.vlz_popak= vzak.c_popak) ),0) " + vbCrLf +_ " from TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ " group by trs_pprodukt,trs_popak,trs_psprz " + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub fill_dok_handl_MARSER(byref pOkresParam) dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "select psp.c_pprodukt,psp.c_popak,psp.p_idobj,sum(psp.c_curIloscopak - isnull(orgpsp.c_curIloscopak,0)),0.0," + vbCrLf +_ "0.0,0.0,sum(psp.c_curwartnetto - isnull(orgpsp.c_curwartnetto,0)),0.0" + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as psp " + vbCrLf +_ " join n5produkt on psp.c_pprodukt = n5produkt.idobj " + vbCrLf +_ " left outer join vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje orgpsp on psp.p_ppopsprzed = orgpsp.p_idobj and psp.coll_lp = orgpsp.coll_lp " + vbCrLf +_ "where psp.p_pRozlVAT <> 0 and n5produkt.eRodzaj=N5PRODUKT_USLUGA and " + pOkresParam.get_where_part(trans_) + vbCrLf +_ "group by psp.c_pprodukt,psp.c_popak,psp.p_idobj" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub prefill() dim strSQL 'prefill table 'strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME select distinct p_idobj, c_idobj," +_ '"0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0 from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania" trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
end class
function new_rent_sp set new_rent_sp = new CRentSPHelper end function
